bull.name: Upside
bull.description: Urban robotaxi networks clear internal unit-economic hurdles; additional metros widen driverless domains without sustained rollback; personal-auto loss costs show durable frequency improvement in carrier data.
bull.confirmingSignals: Sequential permit expansion; rising autonomous passenger-mile share without repeated safety regressions; management commentary linking frequency to pool mix.
bull.whatWouldHappen: Enabler and operator economics re-rate; personal-auto shorts work but require timing discipline; narrow OEM longs without fleet leverage lag.
bull.benefits: Long: NVDA, MBLY. Hedged short: ALL (if frequency story coheres).
bull.hurt: Long legacy OEM without fleet optionality; late-cycle personal-auto longs.

base.name: Base
base.description: Deployment advances in steps with pauses after incidents; liability and insurance terms adjust slowly; urban ownership drifts down while suburbs lag.
base.confirmingSignals: Regulatory advance-and-pause; mixed carrier results; residual pressure concentrated in dense markets.
base.whatWouldHappen: Thesis remains operative but path-dependent; sizing favors liquid enablers over concentrated operator risk; shorts sized for earnings noise.
base.benefits: Liquid compute / stack exposure; diversified platforms with non-AV earnings.
base.hurt: Illiquid single-operator bets; oversized thematic shorts into volatility.

bear.name: Downside
bear.description: Safety or political backlash narrows domains for an extended period; carriers retrench without frequency clarity; OEMs defer city autonomy and consolidate on driver-assist.
bear.confirmingSignals: Permit pullbacks or moratoria; severity-led narratives without offsetting frequency data; capex cuts to urban L4 programs.
bear.whatWouldHappen: Narrow autonomy longs underperform; personal-auto writers may stabilize; diversified megacaps outperform single-theme names.
bear.benefits: Personal lines with pricing power; cash-generative diversified incumbents.
bear.hurt: Pure-play autonomy longs; aggressive personal-auto shorts into mean reversion.
